assertions.reason: The tenant/control-plane review provides the requested full-stack narrative with entrypoints, service chain, state/invariants, and failure points for onboarding, CRUD, lifecycle, module gating, runtime policy, metrics, and support paths.

evidence.observed: Contains `## Entrypoints`, `## Data path and schema touchpoints`, `## Service chain`, `## State and invariants`, `## Side effects and integrations`, and `## Failure points`.

Entrypoints/service-chain sections explicitly cover canonical super-admin company controls, tenant onboarding, company directory/update flows, lifecycle changes, scoped company binding, module gating, tenant runtime policy/usage metrics, and support recovery paths.
Read-only validator confirmed the required section markers `## Entrypoints`, `## Service chain`, `## State and invariants`, and `## Failure points` are present.

assertions.reason: The admin/governance review covers admin user management, changelog publishing, support tickets/GitHub sync, settings/CORS/runtime flags, export approvals, governance boundaries, side effects, and risk hotspots.

evidence.observed: Contains `## Governance controls`, `## Control boundaries`, `## Side effects and integrations`, and `## Risk hotspots`.

Governance controls section explicitly narrates admin user governance, changelog publishing, support tickets and GitHub sync, system settings/CORS/runtime flags, export approvals, and other governance controls.

Risk-hotspot table records critical/high issues around global system settings, public changelog control, third-party support-ticket data export, missing retries/audit trails, approval semantics, and OpenAPI/runtime drift.
Read-only validator confirmed the required section markers `## governance controls`, `## side effects and integrations`, and `## risk hotspots` are present.

frictions: Task tool delegation to user-testing-flow-validator failed in this environment with `Invalid model: custom:CLIProxyAPI-5.4-xhigh`; validation fell back to direct in-session docs inspection per .factory/library/user-testing.md.

Passive runtime probes were degraded (`curl -sf http://localhost:8081/actuator/health` exited 7 and TCP connect to 127.0.0.1:5433 was refused), but foundation-review assertions were documentation-only and remained testable through docs/code-review/**.
